tasks.title: Implement Planner Generator Evaluator loop Phase 1
tasks.description: Add the demand-development loop skeleton with preflight gate, JSON contracts, Codex Planner/Generator wrappers, evaluator repair handoff, and human merge gate.
tasks.verify: python3 -m unittest scripts.tests.test_harness_loop_contracts scripts.tests.test_harness_loop_agents scripts.tests.test_harness_loop_orchestrator -v && python3 -c "import json,pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('docs/harness/evaluator-scenarios/smoke-phase-1-task.json'); p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True); p.write_text(json.dumps({'task_id':'smoke-phase-1-task','must_simulate':True,'user_scenarios':[{'scenario_id':'SMOKE-PHASE-1','user_goal':'Run the Phase 1 fake Planner Generator Evaluator loop and stop at the human merge gate.','prerequisites':['Repository root is writable.','Fake drivers are used.'],'entrypoint':'python3 scripts/harness_loop_orchestrator.py status --repo-root . --run-id smoke-phase-1','steps':['Create confirmed preflight.','Run fake planner.','Run fake generator.','Run fake evaluator.'],'expected_outcomes':['Run phase is passed_waiting_human_merge.','Next action is await_human_merge_confirmation.'],'failure_signals':['The run stops before evaluator.','The run reports a merged/completed state instead of human gate.'],'cleanup':['Remove temporary smoke artifacts after verification.'],'automation_hint':'shell'}]}, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')" && python3 scripts/harness_loop_orchestrator.py preflight --repo-root . --mode demand-development --requirement "Phase 1 smoke demand loop" --run-id smoke-phase-1 --confirm && python3 scripts/harness_loop_orchestrator.py run --repo-root . --run-id smoke-phase-1 --planner-driver fake --generator-driver fake --evaluator-driver fake --max-eval-attempts 2 && python3 -c "import json,pathlib,shutil; run_path=pathlib.Path('.codex/loop-runs/smoke-phase-1/run.json'); data=json.loads(run_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')); assert data['phase']=='passed_waiting_human_merge', data; assert data['next_action']=='await_human_merge_confirmation', data; pathlib.Path('docs/harness/evaluator-scenarios/smoke-phase-1-task.json').unlink(missing_ok=True); shutil.rmtree('.codex/loop-runs/smoke-phase-1', ignore_errors=True); shutil.rmtree('.codex/evaluations/tasks/smoke-phase-1-task', ignore_errors=True)"

tasks.title: Build compute accelerator spec catalog seed
tasks.description: Create the structured accelerator spec catalog, curated wiki pages, crawler source metadata, and validation checks for GPU, NPU, TPU, DPU, IPU, FPGA, DSA, and AI ASIC coverage.
tasks.verify: python personal-wiki/tools/wiki_cli/cli.py --root personal-wiki validate-accelerators && python personal-wiki/tools/wiki_cli/cli.py --root personal-wiki validate --domain ai_infra && PYTHONPATH=personal-wiki/tests pytest -q personal-wiki/tests/test_accelerator_catalog.py && cd personal-wiki/apps/crawler_workbench/backend && PYTHONPATH=. pytest -q tests/test_db_profiles.py

tasks.title: Validate wiki crawler end-to-end through independent evaluator
tasks.description: Run a dedicated evaluator scenario that exercises crawler fetch, queue approval, ingest, index, backlinks, and validation from a user perspective.
tasks.verify: python3 scripts/wiki_crawler_e2e_evaluator.py --repo-root . --output-dir .codex/wiki-crawler-e2e/wiki-crawler-e2e-eval-01

tasks.title: 验证 evaluator auto-trigger wiring 的最小 demo
tasks.description: 运行通用 demo helper 生成一个可验证输出，用于证明 Step4 安装后的 Stop hook 能自动触发 evaluator 并写出 verdict。
tasks.verify: python3 scripts/harness_evaluator_demo.py assert-expected --output-dir .codex/evaluator-demo/harness-evaluator-demo-01
